description: Tests that pr-reviewer triggers for code/PR tasks and not for unrelated queries

test_cases.prompt: Review this PR that adds JWT auth to the login endpoint
Check my code change for security vulnerabilities
Write a PR description for my diff
Generate unit tests for this function
What bugs do you see in this Python code?
Write a changelog entry for the new caching feature
What is the capital of France?
How do I install Python on macOS?
What is the difference between REST and GraphQL?
